# R Compatibility Fixtures

These CSV files are **golden reference outputs** generated by the R `dlnm` package.
They are used by the `test_r_compat_*.py` test suite to verify that PyDLNM
produces numerically identical results.

## Regenerating fixtures

Requirements:
- R >= 4.2
- dlnm >= 2.4.7  (`install.packages("dlnm")`)
- splines (base R)

Run from the repository root:

```bash
Rscript tests/fixtures/generate_fixtures.R
```

This overwrites all CSV files in this directory. Commit the updated files.

## R version used

Record the exact R and dlnm versions here after each regeneration:

```
R version: _____
dlnm version: _____
Date: _____
```

## File inventory

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `synthetic_x.csv` | Deterministic synthetic exposure vector (n=200, set.seed(42)) |
| `coef_12.csv` | Fixed 12-element coefficient vector for crosspred/crossreduce tests |
| `onebasis_ns_df4.csv` | `onebasis(x, fun="ns", df=4)` |
| `onebasis_ns_df4_intercept.csv` | `onebasis(x, fun="ns", df=4, intercept=TRUE)` |
| `onebasis_ns_knots.csv` | `onebasis(x, fun="ns", knots=c(15,20,25))` |
| `onebasis_bs_df5.csv` | `onebasis(x, fun="bs", df=5)` |
| `onebasis_lin.csv` | `onebasis(x, fun="lin")` |
| `onebasis_poly_deg2.csv` | `onebasis(x, fun="poly", degree=2)` |
| `onebasis_thr_h.csv` | `onebasis(x, fun="thr", thr.value=20, side="h")` |
| `onebasis_thr_l.csv` | `onebasis(x, fun="thr", thr.value=20, side="l")` |
| `onebasis_thr_d.csv` | `onebasis(x, fun="thr", thr.value=c(15,25), side="d")` |
| `onebasis_strata_df3.csv` | `onebasis(x, fun="strata", df=3)` |
| `onebasis_integer_lagseq.csv` | `onebasis(0:10, fun="integer")` |
| `crossbasis_ns_df4_ns_df3_lag10.csv` | `crossbasis(x, lag=10, argvar=list(fun="ns",df=4), arglag=list(fun="ns",df=3))` |
| `crossbasis_bs_df4_ns_df3_lag10.csv` | `crossbasis(x, lag=10, argvar=list(fun="bs",df=4), arglag=list(fun="ns",df=3))` |
| `crossbasis_lin_ns_df3_lag10.csv` | `crossbasis(x, lag=10, argvar=list(fun="lin"), arglag=list(fun="ns",df=3))` |
| `crossbasis_ns_df4_strata_df2_lag10.csv` | `crossbasis(x, lag=10, argvar=list(fun="ns",df=4), arglag=list(fun="strata",df=2))` |
| `crossbasis_ns_df4_ns_df3_lag0_21.csv` | `crossbasis(x, lag=c(0,21), argvar=list(fun="ns",df=4), arglag=list(fun="ns",df=3))` |
| `logknots_lag10_nk3.csv` | `logknots(10, nk=3)` |
| `logknots_lag21_nk4.csv` | `logknots(21, nk=4)` |
| `equalknots_lag30_nk3.csv` | `equalknots(0:30, nk=3)` |
| `equalknots_lag30_nk4.csv` | `equalknots(0:30, nk=4)` |
| `crosspred_allfit.csv` | `crosspred(...)$allfit` |
| `crosspred_allse.csv` | `crosspred(...)$allse` |
| `crosspred_alllow.csv` | `crosspred(...)$alllow` |
| `crosspred_allhigh.csv` | `crosspred(...)$allhigh` |
| `crosspred_matfit.csv` | `crosspred(...)$matfit` |
| `crosspred_matse.csv` | `crosspred(...)$matse` |
| `crosspred_matlow.csv` | `crosspred(...)$matlow` |
| `crosspred_mathigh.csv` | `crosspred(...)$mathigh` |
| `crossreduce_overall_fit.csv` | `crossreduce(..., type="overall")$fit` |
| `crossreduce_overall_se.csv` | `crossreduce(..., type="overall")$se` |
| `crossreduce_overall_low.csv` | `crossreduce(..., type="overall")$low` |
| `crossreduce_overall_high.csv` | `crossreduce(..., type="overall")$high` |
| `crossreduce_var_fit.csv` | `crossreduce(..., type="var", value=30)$fit` |
| `crossreduce_var_se.csv` | `crossreduce(..., type="var", value=30)$se` |
| `crossreduce_lag_fit.csv` | `crossreduce(..., type="lag", value=5)$fit` |
| `crossreduce_lag_se.csv` | `crossreduce(..., type="lag", value=5)$se` |
